layoutRegions.name: appeal-hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize denied archive purge appeal posture and expose the appeal packet action.

layoutRegions.name: appeal-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare denied purge appeals, retention exception disputes, and delegated re-approval state.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect legal hold release evidence, retry hash disputes, checksum objections, and rollback-safe appeal packet exhibits.

components.name: AppealCard
components.purpose: Denied archive purge appeal summary with dispute, re-approval state, and packet readiness progress.
interactions: status chip highlights ready, review, or disputed state
progress bar communicates appeal packet completeness without layout shift

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense review row for retention disputes, legal hold releases, delegated re-approvals, and checksum objections.
interactions: state label remains visible at narrow widths
row content stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: AppealPacket
components.purpose: Rollback-safe command and exhibit checklist for overturning a denied purge.
interactions: packet fields preserve long command text without overlapping neighboring panels
checklist remains readable on mobile and desktop

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
